prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to Scotland as it discusses legislation and regulation surrounding pornography, which falls under the devolved powers of the Scottish Parliament. The implications of pornography regulation and enforcement are relevant and applicable to Scotland's legal and legislative framework.
